title: Osmolality Tests: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
oratory tests, reference ranges, and understanding results .
Is there anything else I need to know about osmolality tests? 
Your provider may order more tests along with or after your osmolality test. These may include:
Complete blood count (CBC) 
Blood urea nitrogen (BUN) test 
Blood glucose test 
Electrolyte panel 
Albumin blood test 
Fecal occult blood test (FOBT)
